ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Unique batch number for each batch of the vaccine */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine batch */,
  "dose_per_vial" INTEGER /* Number of doses per vial */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage requirements for the vaccine (e.g., refrigeration temperature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the vaccine is stored */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vaccine available */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory update */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine in the inventory */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine batch in the inventory */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Current storage conditions (e.g., temperature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the vaccine is shipped from */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vaccine shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was shipped */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the logistics provider or carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date the shipment was delivered */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver responsible for the shipment */,
  "driver_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total storage capacity of the facility */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_inventory" (
  "facility_inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility inventory entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the vaccine is stored */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vaccine available */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory update */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine in the facility inventory */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine batch in the facility inventory */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Current storage conditions (e.g., temperature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_inventory_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_inventory_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administration" (
  "administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administration event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the vaccine was administered */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccine */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the vaccine */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccine was administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Number of the dose administered (e.g., first dose, second dose) */,
  "dose_route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., intramuscular, intradermal) */,
  "dose_site" TEXT /* Site of administration (e.g., upper arm, thigh) */,
  "administered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who administered the vaccine */,
  "administered_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who administered the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administration_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administration_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administration_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administration_administered_by FOREIGN KEY ("administered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any pre-existing medical conditions of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, vaccine administration) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., specific actions performed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., low stock, shipment delay) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* ID or name of the recipient of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* ID or name of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., vaccine distribution, administration summary) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data (e.g., CSV file) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* ID or name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the report */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the report file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
